partyName.description: Full legal name of the party to screen (individual, company, or vessel)

partyType.description: Party type: Individual, Entity, Vessel, or Aircraft. Leave empty to search all types.

partyCountry.description: Country of the party (ISO 2-letter code, e.g. CN, RU, IR). Used for context.

partyAddress.description: Address or city of the party. Used for disambiguation.

hitStatus.description: Screening result: CONFIRMED_HIT, POTENTIAL_MATCH, or CLEAR

matchScore.description: Highest fuzzy match score from OFAC SDN list (0-100)

riskLevel.description: Risk assessment: HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, or NONE

matchedEntries.description: List of matched SDN entries with name, type, and score

recommendation.description: Compliance action recommendation: BLOCK, ESCALATE, MANUAL_REVIEW, or APPROVE

rawSearchResults.description: Raw JSON results from OFAC SDN API search
